chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1434 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 16.01.2024 None present for the petitioner Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for the Respondents NO.3 to 5 Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel appearing for Respondents No.3 to 5 / University has filed schedule of payment of pensionary benefits to the petitioners and undertakes that the payments would be paid to him as per schedule. This petition has apparently served its purpose and is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. However, default in payment shall expose the defaulters to contempt proceedings. Judge Judge ARBROHI
